name: aictx-memory
description: Use Aictx local project memory in AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Load and save local project memory with Aictx.
interface.longDescription: Packages the Aictx memory workflow as a Codex skill. Agents stay CLI-first, load task-relevant project memory before substantial work, and save only durable knowledge after meaningful changes.
defaultPrompt: Set up Aictx memory for this repo.
Load Aictx memory before this task.
Decide whether this task changed Aictx memory.
